{{Has quick guide}}
{{Infobox Quest
|name = Misthalin Mystery
|number = 129
|image = [[File:Misthalin Mystery.png|300px]]
|release = [[26 January]] [[2017]]
|update = Prayers Scrolls, QoL & a Quest
|members = No
|series = None
|developer = [[Mod Jed]], [[Mod TomH]],
[[Mod West]], [[Mod Ash]]
}}
'''Misthalin Mystery''' is a standalone [[quest]], being the 130th quest in ''[[Old School RuneScape]]''. It is the second quest to be made specifically for ''Old School RuneScape.'' After escaping from a house party in a spooky manor on a faraway island, [[Abigale]] seeks help for her injured boyfriend [[Hewey]] after being attacked by an unknown figure.

==Details==
{{Quest details
|start = Speak to [[Abigale]] (or [[Hewey]], who sits next to her) in the south-eastern corner of [[Lumbridge Swamp]], near the [[fishing spots]].
|startmap = 3236,3155
|difficulty = Novice
|description = A woman cries as a man lays dying, desperately they beg you to stop a cryptic killer before their friends suffer a similar fate.
|length = Short
|items = * [[Bucket]] (obtainable during quest)
*[[Tinderbox]] (obtainable during quest)
*[[Knife]] (obtainable during quest)
|kills = None
|leagueRegion = <poem>
Not completable, as it requires access to Misthalin.
</poem>
}}

==Walkthrough==
[[File:Misthalin Mystery - Sid dies.png|thumb|200px|Sid is murdered by the Killer.]]
Speak to [[Abigale]], south-east of Lumbridge Swamp, who will ask for the player's help after being attacked by an unknown figure on a nearby island. Board the [[rowboat (Misthalin Mystery)|rowboat]] south of them. Head through the gate, directly west is a fountain. Pick up a [[bucket (Misthalin Mystery)|bucket]] next to the fountain. Head north of the fountain to trigger a cutscene, where [[Sid]] is murdered by the [[Killer]]. Use the bucket on the [[a barrel of rainwater (Misthalin Mystery)|barrel of rainwater]], and search the barrel to obtain a [[manor key]].

===Riddle 1===
[[File:Misthalin Mystery - Tayten dies.png|thumb|left|200px|Tayten is murdered by the Killer.]]
Enter the manor, pick up the [[knife]] on the [[table (Misthalin Mystery)|table]], and attempt to open the door with the red topaz (pink) knob up north. This will trigger another cutscene, where [[Tayten]] is murdered by the [[killer]] hiding in the wardrobe. Before returning to the wardrobe, the killer slides a [[Notes (Misthalin Mystery - 1)|note]] under the door. Pick it up and '''read it''' (You must read it in-order to progress).

[[File:Misthalin_Mystery_-_painting.png|thumb|The painting slashed with a knife.]]
The riddle refers to a [[painting (Misthalin Mystery)|painting]] found in the adjacent room to the south-west (the room with the normal door). The painting is one with mountains, a blue river, and the sun on the horizon (on the east side of the room). Use the knife on it, and search it to find a [[Ruby key (Misthalin Mystery)|ruby key]]. The doorknobs on the doors throughout the mansion will indicate the appropriate key that opens them.

Open the eastern door, and take a [[tinderbox]] from the [[shelves (Misthalin Mystery)|shelves]]. Light all four [[candle (Misthalin Mystery)|unlit candle]]s in the room, and you will get a message the room is warm enough to dry the fuse attached to the [[barrel (Misthalin Mystery)|barrel of explosives]]. Then, use the tinderbox on the barrel next to the damaged wall. Exit the room to trigger the explosion.

===Riddle 2===
[[File:Misthalin Mystery - Lacey dies.png|thumb|200px|Lacey is murdered by the Killer.]]
Climb over the wall, and head north of the manor to trigger another cutscene, where [[Lacey]] is tied up. The [[Killer]] will ask her the name of the vampyre who lives in South Misthalin, but players will be given a choice; none of options matter, so pick any (the correct answer is actually [[Count Check]], but if you say it, the Killer will kill Lacey for you interfering). She will die and the Killer will leave players [[Notes (Misthalin Mystery - 2)|another note]]. Pick it up and read it.

It's like music to my ears!
<br/>The glorious sounds, spelling out your fate!

The riddle refers to the [[piano (Misthalin Mystery)|piano]] found in the north-eastern corner of the manor (music). You must enter the room through the damaged north-eastern wall. The Killer wants you dead - play the notes D-E-A-D on the piano, and search it to find an [[emerald key]].

===Riddle 3===
[[File:Misthalin Mystery - Mandy dies.png|thumb|left|200px|Mandy is murdered by the Killer.]]
Return inside the manor by climbing the damaged east wall, and open the door with the emerald doorknob where the first note was found. Attempt to open the kitchen doors where [[Mandy]] is found, and another cutscene will occur where she is apparently killed by the [[Killer]]. Once again, he will leave players [[Notes (Misthalin Mystery - 3)|a third note]]. Pick it up and read it.
[[File:Misthalin Mystery - Gemstone switch panel.png|thumb|left|200px|The correct solution to the gemstone switch panel.]]

<br/>'''H'''ear at first these word'''s'''.
<br/>'''E'''ach murder you witness helplessly from start to en'''d'''.
<br/>'''A'''s you fail to solve the final letters of this qui'''z'''.
<br/>'''R'''azor sharp like a gemstone is the blade of my knif'''e'''.
<br/>'''T'''he last sound you hear will be your scream's ech'''o'''.
<br/>'''H'''eed that I will have the final word in this thrille'''r'''.

The riddle refers to the unlit fireplace in the eastern room, go out to the south-east room (the damaged wall room) and enter the north door (HEARTH). Use the [[knife]] on the unlit fireplace to reveal a panel of switches inside the hidden compartment. The correct solution corresponds to the final letter of each sentence. Therefore, to open the compartment, click the following in order (sdzeor): Sapphire - Diamond - Zenyte - Emerald - Onyx - Ruby. Search the fireplace once more to find a [[sapphire key]].

===Showdown===
{{Bug|Mobile players may not be able to click on or move the mirror during this part of the quest. Logging out and back in or unequipping your weapon may temporarily solve it.}}{{Bug|When you confront the Killer and trigger the first cutscene, make sure you only click continue on the text box. If you click anywhere but the text box or hit spacebar before the first cutscene completes, the game will force you out of the room and end the cutscene early. This can be very confusing initially if you're unaware.}}[[File:Misthalin Mystery - confronting Killer.png|thumb|left|200px|Showdown with the mysterious Killer.]]
Open the westernmost door, and a cutscene will occur where the player confronts the [[Killer]].

He will hide in wardrobes and throw knives. The player can know which wardrobe he's in by looking for a brief black shadow surrounding the wardrobe. The player must push the mirror into the row/column of the wardrobe and '''then push it at least once towards the wardrobe''' in order to have the mirror facing the wardrobe to reflect the thrown knife back to the killer (otherwise the mirror will deflect the knife, but not back at the killer). You need to get the knife to bounce back at the killer a few times before proceeding on with the quest.[[File:Misthalin Mystery - two Killers.png|thumb|200px|They were the two killers all along!]]
After defeating the Killer, players will discover that the killer was [[Abigale]] all along! She complains about how adventurers always take all the glory from her when she tries to help others every year. However, another killer appears, and reveals himself as Abigale's boyfriend, [[Hewey]].
[[File:Misthalin Mystery - Mandy kills Abigale.png|thumb|left|200px|Mandy finishes off Abigale with a [[Bandos godsword]].]]
After basking in her glory, Abigale argues with Hewey over her selfishness, and in her anger, kills him. Pick up the [[killer's knife]] and attack Abigale.

As you attempt to leave the manor, Abigale attempts to kill you, but is stopped by [[Mandy]], who survived due to her having dextrocardia, a rare condition where her heart is located on the right side.

Speak to her outside the mansion to collect the rewards which require 3 empty inventory slots. Congratulations, quest complete!

{{clear}}

==Rewards==
{{Quest rewards
|name = Misthalin Mystery
|image = [[File:Misthalin Mystery reward scroll.png|centre]]
|qp = 1
|rewards =
*[[Uncut ruby]]
*[[Uncut emerald]]
*[[Uncut sapphire]]
*{{SCP|Crafting|600}} [[Crafting]] [[experience]]
}}

==Transcript==
{{hastranscript|Quest}}

==Changes==
{{Subject changes header}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 14 January 2026
|update = New Player Improvements Round 2
|change = The quest's journal entry was updated to make it more intuitive.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 17 January 2019
|update = Kebos Graphical Changes and Other Fixes
|change = The doors of the mansion now open and close as you walk past them.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 4 January 2018
|update = Dragon Slayer II
|change = Fixed a spelling error within the Misthalin Mystery quest.
}}
{{Subject changes footer}}

==Trivia==
* This quest was originally released as the [[2016 Halloween event]], but was later released as a permanent quest after passing a poll.
** The [[Poll:Old School Content Poll 49: Silver Jewellery|poll]] to include Misthalin Mystery as a permanent quest passed by the narrowest margin in the history of ''Old School RuneScape'', reaching the 75% threshold by only 10 votes.
* Players initially did not receive 600 [[Crafting]] [[experience]] upon completing the quest in an approximately 30 minute window before a hotfix was implemented. Players who completed the quest before the reward was added were told to speak with [[Mandy]] outside the mansion to receive the additional reward.
* The mansion in this quest is based on [[Draynor Manor]].
* No music plays at all during the quest. If you were to travel to the island and then log out and back in, you would find that your music player is playing nothing at all.
* The quest plot is loosely based on the movie ''{{wp|Scream (1996 film)|Scream}}'' and it includes several references: the characters in the quest are named similarly to those in the movie and their examine texts include further allusions; both satirise horror clichés; and the quote "What is your favourite scary quest?" is a play on the opening scene of the movie.
* There is a [[Bandos godsword (Misthalin Mystery)|Bandos godsword]] within the room where [[Mandy]] is, although there is currently no way the player is able to reach the weapon. The godsword still has the 'Take' option, teasing players.
* If you wait long enough after the final encounter before trying to leave the room, both Killers will stand up. Attempting to talk to them will give you the message that they probably don't want to talk to you.
* The quote "I used to be an adventurer like you" is a reference to ''{{wp|The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim}}'' and the subsequent [https://knowyourmeme.com/memes/i-took-an-arrow-in-the-knee meme].
* According to [[Mod Ash]], the island is "still part of the Kingdom of Misthalin, but the bit they don't talk about, where even the guards daren't go".{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1014629951734190080|date=4 July 2018|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/96655|archivedate=30 May 2020|quote=Kingdom of Misthalin, but the bit they don't talk about, where even the guards daren't go.}}
* The player says "Thank Saradomin" in relief at the end, this is inconsistent with other quests where the player uses Guthix in exclamation instead.
* Unlike normal [[fireplaces]], the fireplaces in the mansion cannot be used to cook raw food.
* The [[Killer]] incorrectly claims that [[Count Check]] is a [[vampyre]], when he is instead a human pretending to be one.
** At the time, however, Count Check was indeed a vampyre until an update in [[2023]] where his dialogue was written.

==References==
{{Reflist}}

{{Misthalin Mystery}}
